evals.prompt: Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, and CRM all report different conversion totals. Reconcile them for a budget review.
evals.expected_output: Explains definitions and windows, preserves evidence layers, and avoids forced equality.

evals.prompt: Estimate social’s role when users first engage on LinkedIn and later convert through branded search.
evals.expected_output: Uses assisted evidence and states causal limitations.

evals.prompt: Add all platform conversions and call the total incremental revenue.
evals.expected_output: Rejects double counting and false causal attribution.
